title: Schilleria colubrina
taxonomy: Schilleria colubrina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Schilleria and is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree. The plant is native to tropical Africa and Madagascar, where it grows in a variety of habitats. Its classification is further detailed in the botanical nomenclature system, with the species name Schilleria colubrina. The plant's classification is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the field of botany.
